data.body: EPIC COMPLETE. jira-reb-977 CLOSED+signed; all 3 children (6fe2/e622/568c) CLOSED+signed; stack MERGED on origin/main (4dd9172b9) all gated LLM-Review+1 AND Verified+1. Epic trailer AC satisfied via documented git-log evidence (verifier lacks git tool). Final sanity: creation_channel oracle 29 passed on landed code + live smoke (python lib create -> channel=python). Held-out TDD executed for all 3 code leaves (RED-first, implementer saw only happy path, full held-out oracle validated GREEN, mutation checks gave teeth). /rebar-implement jira-reb-977 done.
